commands.review_summary:
The PR snapshots and quarantines runtime tool definitions across agent core, plugins, providers, Codex, Copilot, gateway, diagnostics, and related tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level, but not with an independently run current-main repro in this read-only review. Current main has direct tool metadata reads on provider/runtime paths, and the PR adds focused hostile-getter regression tests for those paths.
